prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-FLEXCUTTINGMAT-PARENT Product Type: CUTTING_BOARD Brand (from catalog): Universal Home Existing Title: Universal Home Flexible Cutting Mat 13.25 x 9.5 Inch Dishwasher Safe (2 Colors) Description: Cut your favorite meats, seafood and produce without the mess with the Universal Home Flexible Cutting Mat.

This cutting mat is easy to clean - simply wash it with soap and water, or place it in the top rack of your dishwasher. Manufactured in compliance with all applicable FDA regulations, this mat is guaranteed food contact safe. It's also lightweight and flexible, and will not dull your knives.

Universal Home cutting mats are stain and odor resistant, and are constructed of duable polypropylene. Each mat measures 13.25" x 9.5", and will fit on most kitchen surfaces. This is a must-have cutting board for any kitchen. Search Terms: cutting boards for kitchen dishwasher safe plastic flexible clear board Features: - Universal Home Flexible Cutting Mat - 13.25" x 9.5" - Easy to Clean - Top Rack Dishwasher Safe - Food Contact Safe - Manufactured in Compliance with FDA - Lightweight & Flexible - Will Not Dull Knives - Stain & Odor Resistant - Constructed of Durable Polypropylene === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Home Flexible Cutting Mat 13.25 x 9.5 Inch

openai.item_name: Universal Home 13.25 x 9.5 in Flexible Cutting Mat

anthropic.title_differentiation: Dishwasher Safe, Food Contact Safe, Stain And Odor Resistant, Won't Dull Knives

openai.title_differentiation: Dishwasher Safe, Food Contact Safe, Flexible Polypropylene, Stain And Odor Resistant, Will Not Dull Knives
